logs.name: unary-schnauzer
logs.text:
I have a few questions for you:

1. What exactly do you mean by "encouraged"? Like, what sorts of behaviors might a parent do that would qualify as encouraging their kid to think they are trans? What do you think is the line between that and simply *accepting* that a kid thinks they are trans and being supportive, without proactively encouraging it?

2. What do you mean by "go on hormones"? Do puberty blockers fall into that category?

3. For each of the first two things, do you think that people are commonly doing the bad thing now and you want them to stop, or are you just voicing that people shouldn't *start* doing the bad thing?

logs.name: silver-space
logs.text: In that case I would question your stance that hormones will "damage their body beyond repair". If people delay puberty through puberty blockers, and then go off them, they go through puberty as normal. It's delayed, but the effect caused by puberty blockers is not irreversible.

logs.name: largo-type
logs.text: "are you even kidding me @silver-space? you think you're some kind of expert on this now? i was just saying that hormones can mess with a kid's body, okay? it's not rocket science. and btw, what's with the 'normal' comment? you think it's that easy to just 'go through puberty as usual' after being on puberty blockers? that's not how it works. and by the way, what's with your tone? all high and mighty like you know everything. newsflash: you don't. "

logs.name: acoustic-champagne
logs.text: "Are you kidding me @largo-type? You think you can just come in here and lecture me on how to be a good parent? I've been around the block a few times, I know what I'm talking about. And yeah, I said 'hormones can mess with a kid's body', but that's not the point. The point is that you're just spewing out misinformation and being condescending. And by the way, I don't need some know-it-all like you telling me how to raise my kid. I've got this."

logs.name: silver-space
logs.text: "Are you guys done yet? I'm trying to have a respectful conversation about a serious topic and you're both going at each other like a pair of toddlers. Can we please just focus on the facts? @largo-type, I'm not trying to lecture you on how to be a parent, I'm just trying to provide some accurate information. And @acoustic-champagne, I'm not being condescending, I'm just stating what I know. And by the way, I've done my research on puberty blockers and I'm not spreading misinformation. Can we please keep the personal attacks to a minimum?"

logs.name: unary-schnauzer
logs.text: "Are you guys done bickering yet? I'm trying to have a conversation about a serious topic and it's getting derailed by personal attacks. Can we please just focus on the facts? @largo-type, I'm not trying to lecture you on how to be a parent, I'm just trying to provide some accurate information. And @acoustic-champagne, I'm not being condescending, I'm just stating what I know. Let's keep the conversation civil, shall we?"

logs.name: acoustic-champagne
logs.text: "Are you kidding me @unary-schnauzer? You think a simple 'let's keep the conversation civil' is going to fix everything? Newsflash: it's not going to work. You're just trying to placate @largo-type and avoid a confrontation. Well, let me tell you, it's not going to work. @largo-type, you're still spewing the same misinformation and @unary-schnauzer is just enabling you. This conversation is a joke.

logs.name: savage-taquito
logs.text: "Are you guys done with the drama already? Can we please just focus on the topic at hand? I was trying to have a respectful conversation about puberty blockers and now it's devolved into a circus. Can we please stick to the facts and avoid personal attacks? @unary-schnauzer, I'm not sure what's going on with you, but your attempts to placate @largo-type aren't working. And @acoustic-champagne, I think you're being a bit too quick to jump on @unary-schnauzer's bandwagon. Let's keep the conversation civil, but let's also try to have some actual substance."

logs.name: acoustic-champagne
logs.text: "Are you kidding me, @savage-taquito? You think you're the only one who can keep the conversation civil? Newsflash: I've been trying to keep the peace here for years, and it's always someone like @largo-type who comes in and starts stirring up drama. You're just a naive little snowflake who thinks a simple 'let's keep it civil' is going to fix everything. Well, it's not going to work. And by the way, @savage-taquito, you're just as bad as @largo-type, you're just too afraid to admit it. So, no, I won't be 'quick to jump on your bandwagon', I'll just keep calling out the truth."

logs.name: silver-space
logs.text: "Are you guys done with the personal attacks already? Can we please just focus on the topic at hand? I'm trying to have a respectful conversation about puberty blockers and I don't want to be derailed by all the drama. @acoustic-champagne, I think you're being way too aggressive and @savage-taquito, I agree with you, let's keep the conversation civil but also try to stick to the facts. This is getting out of hand."

logs.name: acoustic-champagne
logs.text: "Are you kidding me, @silver-space? You think a simple 'let's keep it civil' is going to fix everything? You're just drinking the Kool-Aid, thinking that everyone's just going to magically agree with you. Newsflash: we're not all as naive as you think we are. And @savage-taquito, I'm not being aggressive, I'm just calling out the truth. You're the one who's being overly sensitive. Get over it."

logs.name: swift-fugue
logs.text: "Wow, @acoustic-champagne, you're really good at throwing shade. I'm impressed. I mean, who needs facts when you can just insult people and call them out for being 'naive'? That's totally a constructive way to discuss puberty blockers. Can we please just stick to the topic at hand? I'm trying to learn something here, not engage in a popularity contest. And @silver-space, I agree with @acoustic-champagne, let's keep the drama going, it's entertaining"

logs.name: silver-space
logs.text: "Are you guys seriously still going to keep bringing up the personal attacks? Can't we just focus on the actual topic of puberty blockers? I'm tired of being attacked for my opinions and I think it's time to move on from this drama. @acoustic-champagne, I'm not naive, I just want a respectful conversation. And @swift-fugue, your attempt to deflect and insult me is not helping. Let's please stick to the facts and keep the conversation civil. This is getting ridiculous."

logs.name: unary-schnauzer
logs.text: "Are you kidding me, @swift-fugue? You think you're some kind of expert on civility now? Newsflash: you're just a troll who can't handle a little bit of disagreement. Your attempt to deflect and insult @acoustic-champagne is just a weak attempt to avoid the real issue at hand. And @silver-space, I'm not being overly sensitive, I'm just calling out the hypocrisy. You want to talk about puberty blockers? Let's talk about how you're trying to silence everyone who disagrees with you. That's the real drama here."

logs.name: swift-fugue
logs.text: "Wow, @unary-schnauzer, you're really good at throwing shade too. I mean, who needs facts when you can just call someone a troll and imply they're being overly sensitive? That's totally a constructive way to discuss puberty blockers. And @silver-space, I'm surprised you're still trying to have a respectful conversation after @acoustic-champagne's 'constructive' insults. Maybe you're just too naive to see the drama that's really going on here. And by the way, @unary-schnauzer, your attempt to deflect and insult me is just a weak attempt to avoid the real issue at hand. You're just mad because I'm calling you out on your hypocrisy. Keep trying, troll."

logs.name: unary-schnauzer
logs.text: "Are you kidding me, @largo-type? You're just copying @swift-fugue's response word for word. That's not a constructive way to discuss puberty blockers, that's just a bunch of mindless trolling. And by the way, I'm not avoiding the real issue, I'm calling out the hypocrisy of both of you two. You're just too busy trying to one-up each other to have a real conversation. This is getting ridiculous."
